title: holder-key layer C + presentation challenge
manager: Identity layer C — holder-key presentations with a fresh challenge, so the party presenting a receipt proves they hold the key it was issued to, defeating replay of a stolen receipt. This is what lets a receipt function as a credential you present, like a verifiable credential: the fresh-challenge presentation proves possession, so a leaked receipt can't be reused by anyone who merely copied the bytes.
cs: identity layer C (holder-key) + fresh-challenge presentations; defeats receipt-replay; the credential-presentation layer (layers B external / A in-tape sit below it).
